title: DGPO: RL-Steered Graph Diffusion for Neural Architecture Generation

method.name: Directed Graph Policy Optimization (DGPO)
method.description: Extends GDPO to directed acyclic graphs via topological node ordering and positional encoding
method.foundation: Builds on DiGress as its discrete diffusion backbone

performance.accuracy_comparison: Within 0.32 percentage points of full-data model

experiments.name: Bidirectional control
experiments.description: Inverting the reward signal drives generation toward near random-chance accuracy

experiments.name: Multi-objective reward formulations
experiments.result: Framework extends to multi-objective reward formulations

contributions.description: Extends GDPO to directed acyclic graphs via topological node ordering and positional encoding
Evidence that the model learns transferable structural priors
Evidence for steering mechanism and extension to multi-objective reward formulations

related_work.description: Framing denoising as a reinforcement learning problem
